enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual vlog update from his apartment in Boulder, Colorado on January 8, 2017. He covers a failed shower repair attempt, an evening spent doing maintenance work on his personal website, and a list of upcoming tasks including selling his car, printing photos for his walls, and starting an audiobook project.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: frustrated but not panicked; willing to call maintenance and use the clubhouse shower in the meantime
enjoys the low-effort cleanup work like updating colors, numbers, and statuses
committed to listing it aggressively regardless of outcome
won't start indoor cycling training until February because there's too much website and admin work to finish first
ready to start; plans to record audio first and do the accompanying video later

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I started kind of slow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the hardware store to try to fix my shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took a part out of my shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't been able to use the hot shower.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I replaced the part but it didn't do anything.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll have to call them tomorrow and Monday to see if they can help me figure it out.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It would suck if I had to get a plumber to fix it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't have much money.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: At least I can take a shower at the clubhouse.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My roommate doesn't bother me to fix it right away.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was working on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wanted to fix the numbers speed on my micro shower little page for 40 kilometers.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I realized it was only like three levels.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I decided to go ahead and fix it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I spent the rest of last night working on my page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: A lot of the pages were in a state of incompletion.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Many of them were extremely basic, just at the pasting stage.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The work I had to do was super easy, like changing colors and numbers and the status.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I like doing that kind of work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's definitely worth it under the umbrella of stuff I need to do before I start exercising.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't want to finish my bike race or level page or anything like that yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to get all the obvious stuff done, like level stuff for my whole website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'll probably be working on it the rest of the month.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I probably won't start writing my rollers until sometime in February.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There's just so much stuff that I have to do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm definitely going to put my car up for sale and aggressively try to sell it no matter what.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was going to zoom down with this.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There was a lot of stuff I wanted to do on my site yesterday.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to print up my photos and post them on the walls.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to put hooks around the walls.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I still have to clean up my room and my floor.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm missing the history of being on a podcast.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm ready to start doing the audiobook thing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might just do an audiobook today and do the video about it later on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on the sound right now.
